recommendations.title: The Life and Death of Colonel Blimp
recommendations.overview: General Candy, who's overseeing an English squad in 1943, is a veteran leader who doesn't have the respect of the men he's training and is considered out-of-touch with what's needed to win the war. But it wasn't always this way. Flashing back to his

recommendations.title: A Canterbury Tale
recommendations.overview: Three modern-day pilgrims investigate a bizarre crime in a small town while on their way to Canterbury.

recommendations.title: A Matter of Life and Death
recommendations.overview: A British wartime aviator who cheats death must argue for his life before a celestial court, hoping to prolong his fledgling romance with an American girl.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: The Thief of Bagdad
recommendations.overview: When Prince Ahmad is blinded and cast out of Bagdad by the nefarious Jaffar, he joins forces with the scrappy thief Abu to win back his royal place, as well as the heart of a beautiful princess.
recommendations.director: Michael Powell, Ludwig Berger, Tim Whelan

recommendations.title: Peeping Tom
recommendations.overview: Loner Mark Lewis works at a film studio during the day and, at night, takes racy photographs of women. Also he's making a documentary on fear, which involves recording the reactions of victims as he murders them. He befriends Helen, the daughter of t

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Sisu
recommendations.overview: When an ex-soldier who discovers gold in the Lapland wilderness tries to take the loot into the city, German soldiers led by a brutal SS officer battle him.

recommendations.title: The Red Shoes
recommendations.overview: A fledgling ballerina falls in love with a brilliant composer, but the jealous head of the ballet company plots to drive them apart.

recommendations.title: Dunkirk
recommendations.overview: The story of the miraculous evacuation of Allied soldiers from Belgium, Britain, Canada and France, who were cut off and surrounded by the German army from the beaches and harbour of Dunkirk between May 26th and June 4th 1940 during World War II.
